issues: The hero section containing the main heading '{ Fast, Correct } — Choose two' and the 'Install Bazel' call to action is missing.
The 'Trusted by industry leaders' social proof section at the bottom of the page is missing.
Inconsistent capitalization in card titles: 'Release Notes' is in Title Case, while others like 'Get started', 'User's guide', and 'Community updates' are in Sentence Case.
Inconsistent capitalization in link text: the 'Get Started >' link uses Title Case, whereas other links like 'Read the docs >', 'Search the guide >', and 'View notes >' use Sentence Case.
The primary illustration for the 'Essential Bazel' section (next to the section title and description in the original site) is missing.
Inconsistent layout for section descriptions: the 'Essential Bazel' description text is full-width, while the 'What's New?' description text is narrow and left-aligned.
